arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres responds as Gabriel celebration revenge explained after Arsenal thrash Sporting
arts.sum: Gunners thrash Portuguese giants on quiet night for Sweden star

arts.ttl: 15 G/A in 13 games – Arsenal monitoring €45m-rated forward ahead of potential transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly eyeing up a potential transfer move for Atalanta’s in-form Italian striker Mateo Retegui, whose value has risen to around €45million. That’s according to a report from Calciomercato, who state that the Gunners have been keeping an eye on Retegui as he’s continued to shine in Serie A and the Champions League this […] The post 15 G/A in 13 games – Arsenal monitoring €45m-rated forward ahead of potential transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Big smile on my face': Bukayo Saka says Arsenal have a truly 'unbelievable' talent he loves playing alongside
arts.sum: Arsenal made it two comprehensive wins in a row after the international break as they hammered Sporting CP 5-1 in their Champions League encounter in...

arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal & Chelsea aiming to get major transfer deal done for £80m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are both keen on the potential transfer of Alexander Isak, but won’t pay Newcastle United’s £115million asking price for the Swedish striker. Instead, the London giants are aiming to try to get Isak’s fee down to more like £80m, sources have told CaughtOffside, while RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko is being considered […] The post Revealed: Arsenal & Chelsea aiming to get major transfer deal done for £80m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals why Sporting CP rout is 'landmark win' in Arsenal tenure
arts.sum: Gunners boss hails team after the best away European victory of his almost five years in charge
BBC Radio 5 Live’s Leon Osman and Ian Dennis discuss Arsenal’s performance in their 5-1 win over Sporting in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Man City stumble again while Arsenal and Bayern Munich earn dominant wins
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid and Atalanta scored six apiece and Bayer Leverkusen five while Robert Lewandowski reached 100 Champions League goals.

arts.ttl: Arsenal get their statement road win in Champions League as Odegaard dazzles
arts.sum: Arsenal needed to make a statement after a run of underwhelming form and thanks to the return of Martin Odegaard, they got it with an emphatic display at Sporting.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand praises Arsenal's 'statement performance' in 5-1 demolition of Sporting Lisbon - and singles out one star after Champions League triumph
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta 's side led from the seventh minute onwards and, barring a period of pressure early in the second half, they blew away the Portuguese champions.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails Arsenal's 5-1 Champions League win over Sporting as best European away display of his tenure and insists it will kickstart the Gunners' season
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE ESTADIO JOSE ALVALADE: Mikel Arteta believes Arsenal's emphatic thrashing of Sporting Lisbon was the best European away display in his tenure.
